narrative.headline: What 2024 Jeep Grand Cherokee owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 226 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (45% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Vehicle lost power on multiple occasions where it could not be operated or jump started to get moving. Odometer blinking/blind spot indicators staying illuminated/rear back-up camera fault reading "system unavailable"  Brake pedal kicking back when trying to start the Jeep. Gear
